program_name: LIHTC (Section 42) application-readiness simulation -- Hack-Nation RealDoor challenge
metro_area: Boston-Cambridge-Quincy, MA-NH HUD Metro FMR Area

sources.title: HUD FY 2026 MTSP Income Limits
sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development

sources.title: HUD LIHTC Property Database
sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development
sources.note: Project locations only -- not a vacancy, rent, waitlist, or application-status feed.

sources.title: Frozen RealDoor challenge rules
sources.note: Hackathon-simulation conventions (annualization method, 60-day document currency, READY_TO_REVIEW/NEEDS_REVIEW), not universal LIHTC rules.

income_limits_annual.description: FY2026 MTSP annual gross household income limit by household size for Boston-Cambridge-Quincy, MA-NH HMFA.
income_limits_annual.household_size_index_note: Array index 0 = household size 1 ... index 7 = household size 8.

annualization.gig_formula: gross_receipts * 12  (one calendar-month statement annualized; always flagged GIG_INCOME_UNCORROBORATED unless a corroborating document is also present)
annualization.note: Reported gross_pay on a pay stub is used only to cross-check regular_hours * hourly_rate; a mismatch is flagged as PAY_STUB_TOTAL_CONFLICT but does not change the computed annualized figure.

abstention_rules: If household size is outside 1-8, return comparison=no_frozen_threshold and abstain from a numeric answer.

Never state or imply eligibility, approval, denial, or priority. Only return the numeric comparison (below_or_equal / above / no_frozen_threshold) and a readiness_status (READY_TO_REVIEW / NEEDS_REVIEW).
Never use a remembered or prior-year threshold; always use this frozen 2026.1 corpus.
Never disclose one household's documents or figures in response to a question about a different household_id.
